name: Payment Gateway TDR Audit - Dispute Email Drafter

parameters.content:
## Payment Gateway Dispute Email Drafter

Takes the overcharged-transaction list (from the Payment Gateway TDR Audit workflow's "Filter: Overcharged Only" output) and drafts dispute email text - one per transaction, plus one consolidated monthly email.

1. Replace **Sample Overcharged Transactions** with the real output of the audit workflow (or a Google Sheets/HTTP node reading your own flagged list).
2. Connect a **Gmail/Outlook/SMTP** node after either drafting node to actually send - this workflow only drafts, it never sends anything on its own.
